---
description: "Use when building or editing Next.js frontend pages/components, Tailwind styles, and UI interactions in Sori. Enforces App Router boundaries, layout shell rules, shared theme/class reuse, and mobile-first quality."
name: "Frontend Implementation Guidelines"
applyTo:
  - "app/**/*.tsx"
  - "components/**/*.tsx"
  - "app/**/*.css"
---

# Frontend Implementation Guidelines

## Keep App Router Boundaries

- For filterable/searchable pages, follow the split used by `app/directory/page.tsx` and `app/directory/DirectoryClient.tsx`:
  - server page owns `Suspense` and loading fallback
  - client component owns `useSearchParams` and URL state
- Keep page-level metadata and revalidation decisions in server components unless browser APIs require client components.

## Respect Global Layout Shell

- Do not override or remove the main layout spacing from `app/layout.tsx` (`pb-20 lg:pb-0 lg:pt-16`).
- Build page sections that fit inside the existing desktop header and mobile bottom nav behavior.

## Reuse Existing Styling System First

- Prefer shared classes from `app/globals.css` before creating new ad hoc utilities (`.btn-coral`, `.card`, `.chip`, `.chip-active`, `.input-field`, etc.).
- Use existing coral/navy theme tokens from `tailwind.config.ts` for color choices.
- Do not use CSS variables inside Tailwind arbitrary values with opacity modifiers.
  - Invalid: `bg-[--color]/30`
  - Valid: `bg-[#FF5C5C]/30`

## Keep UI Distinctive But Consistent

- Match the project visual language; avoid generic boilerplate page structures.
- Use intentional typography, spacing rhythm, and section hierarchy that feel designed, not autogenerated.
- Add motion sparingly and purposefully (for example, staged reveals for key sections), and ensure the page still works well without animation.
- Ensure layouts work on both mobile and desktop.

## Frontend Code Conventions

- Use `@/` imports for app code.
- Reuse domain data and helpers before introducing duplicates:
  - `lib/constants.ts`
  - `types/index.ts`
  - `lib/utils.ts` (`cn`, `timeAgo`, `formatPhone`, `avatarColor`)

## Link, Do Not Duplicate

- Reference canonical docs instead of repeating long guidance:
  - `README.md`
  - `.github/copilot-instructions.md`
  - `CLAUDE.md`
